title: ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SOUTH COUNTY SERVICES CENTER ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to adults with mental health disorders including outpatient services, individual, family, and group therapy, psychiatric assessments and supports and medication managements when appropriate. 51340 Highway 97 South La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Adults with mental health disorders such as mood disorders, anxiety, or trauma related issues Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 322-7500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 322-7500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County and Cities of Crescent, Crescent Lake, and La Pine Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH COUNTY SERVICES CENTER
